creator: bogorodskiy@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

I intended to comment on the PR but occasionally commented on
ports/149361 instead.

I will paste my reply from there:

------
Hello,

Thanks for the patch! There are few things blocking me from
committing gnutls update right away:

* Number of port depend on gnutls, they need to be tested, dependency
lines should be fixed for new gnutls shlib version and portrevisions
should be bumped
* The ports tree is in a feature freeze currently, and only feature
safe commits are allowed; gnutls update is not feature safe because
of the shared library version change described above

I plan to get to it as soon as the freeze ends.

Thanks,

Roman Bogorodskiy
-------

Roman Bogorodskiy
